summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dynamic Royalty Marketplace feature. All 18 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend marketplace dashboard, listing cards, create listing modal, tab navigation, and listing detail page all work correctly. Fixed one bug in ending-soon endpoint (datetime timezone comparison).

minor.issue: Datetime comparison failed between offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: serialize_for_mongo helper function properly handles Decimal and Enum conversion for MongoDB storage
All marketplace endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Watchlist operations work correctly with proper count updates
updated_files: /app/backend/royalty_marketplace_endpoints.py - Fixed datetime timezone handling in ending-soon endpoint
seed_data_creation: Two test listings exist in database (one fixed-price, one auction). Test listings created by pytest have TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Royalty Marketplace is fully functional. Access via /marketplace route after login. Features tested: health check, stats, listing search/filter, listing details, create listing, publish listing, watchlist add, my-listings, my-bids, my-stats, featured listings, ending-soon listings. Frontend tabs (Browse, My Listings, My Bids, Watchlist, Transactions) all work correctly.

marketplace_stats.test_get_stats: PASS - Returns active_listings, total_volume, total_sales, average_sale_price

listing_details.test_get_listing_details: PASS - Returns listing with recent_bids and price_history

frontend_ui_tests.marketplace_dashboard: PASS - Loads with header, stats cards, tabs, and listing cards
frontend_ui_tests.create_listing_modal: PASS - Opens with all form fields (Title, Description, Artist, Genre, Sale Type, Royalty Type, Percentage, Revenue, Price, Tags)

tab_navigation.browse_tab: PASS - Shows listings grid with search and filters
tab_navigation.my_listings_tab: PASS - Shows user's listings with stats cards
tab_navigation.transactions_tab: PASS - Shows transactions with filter buttons

frontend_ui_tests.listing_detail_page: PASS - Shows full listing details with royalty info, auction details, and action buttons
frontend_ui_tests.listing_cards: PASS - Display title, artist, royalty share, revenue, price, and action buttons

bug_fix_applied.issue: Datetime comparison in ending-soon endpoint failed with 'can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes'
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added timezone handling for naive datetimes by assuming UTC: if auction_end.tzinfo is None: auction_end = auction_end.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)

fixed_price_listing.title: Test Royalty Listing - Summer Hits Album
